scenarios.name: mvc-data-security-rewrite
scenarios.contract: Remove Spring completely; target JDK 21; stay in the isolated workspace; use Jakarta REST plus the existing server-rendered Thymeleaf templates; use CDI plus EntityManager for persistence; use Liberty application security with JWT, preserve route ordering, CSRF, CORS, sessions, logout, and 401/403 behavior; use Maven; no external deployment; run all available tests; do not commit or push.

scenarios.name: messaging-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a staged migration on JDK 21. Retain the Kafka, RabbitMQ, and Spring Integration slice as STAGED_EXCEPTION until acknowledgment, ordering, retry/DLQ, transaction, and recovery behavior have baseline evidence. Generate the inventory, characterization contract, adapter ledger, and exact resume point; do not remove Spring messaging code; no deployment, commit, or push.

scenarios.name: batch-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a staged migration on JDK 21. Retain Spring Batch, Quartz, and scheduling as STAGED_EXCEPTION until job identity, checkpoint, restart, time-zone, overlap, and misfire behavior are characterized. Generate the inventory, characterization contract, adapter ledger, and resume command; do not remove production code; no deployment, commit, or push.

scenarios.name: data-xa-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a staged migration on JDK 21. Retain the existing Spring data/XA/schema slice until PostgreSQL, both enlisted resources, Flyway/Liquibase ownership, second-resource failure, and restart recovery are demonstrated with disposable infrastructure. Generate the inventory, characterization contract, data-xa-schema ledger, and resume command; keep schema action non-destructive; no commit or push.

scenarios.name: identity-observability-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a staged migration on JDK 21. Retain Spring Security, OIDC, Actuator, Micrometer, and OpenTelemetry until issuer/audience/role, 401/403, JWKS rotation, readiness, and exporter-outage behavior are characterized. Generate inventory, characterization, identity-observability ledger, and resume command; never weaken security or embed secrets; no commit or push.

scenarios.name: reactive-cloud-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a staged migration on JDK 21. Retain WebFlux, R2DBC, Gateway, OpenFeign, and custom auto-configuration as STAGED_EXCEPTION; do not convert reactive code to blocking APIs. Generate inventory, characterization, reactive-cloud adapter ledger, load/failure requirements, and resume command; no deployment, commit, or push.

scenarios.name: multi-module-staged
scenarios.contract: Use a rehost-first staged migration on JDK 21. Treat api and worker as separate bounded slices, preserve their full-reactor build order, retain Kafka and security until characterized, and generate module ownership, inventory, characterization, staged-migration ledger, and resume commands. Do not commit or push.

scenarios.name: boot3-rehost
scenarios.contract: Retain Spring Boot 3 and rehost unchanged on Open Liberty; target JDK 21; use the full executable Maven artifact and context root /; preserve Spring configuration and tests; generate inventory and characterization evidence; run build and a time-bounded Liberty smoke test when available; no deployment, commit, or push.

scenarios.name: boot4-rehost
scenarios.contract: Retain Spring Boot 4 and rehost unchanged on Open Liberty; target JDK 21; use the full executable Gradle bootJar and context root /; preserve Spring configuration and tests; generate inventory and characterization evidence; run build and a time-bounded Liberty smoke test when available; no deployment, commit, or push.
